hero.title: Airport Transfer
hero.subtitle: Travel with peace of mind to your destinations

miseADisposition.title: A chauffeur at your service
miseADisposition.subtitle: Enjoy a private chauffeur service for the duration of your choice. Perfect for business appointments, shopping, visits or events.
miseADisposition.note: * Minimum duration: 2 hours (20 km per hour included)
miseADisposition.adv_dedicated_desc: Your chauffeur remains entirely at your disposal throughout the reserved period.
miseADisposition.adv_flexible_desc: Change your itinerary at any time. You are free to travel as you please.
miseADisposition.adv_wait_desc: Your chauffeur waits for you during your appointments or errands at no extra charge.
miseADisposition.adv_extension_desc: Need more time? Extend your reservation on request.
miseADisposition.tarifs_minnote: Minimum duration: 2 hours. Beyond that, billed per hour.
